title: Children's Vehicle Accessories Complete Plastic Gear Sets Compatible with Models (550 & 390) (550 B small gear)
features: 【 Plastic Gear】Made of material, these plastic gears are and long-lasting, a reliable performance.
【Compatible with 550 and 390 Gearbox】Specifically designed for kids' electric rc cars with 550 and 390 gearboxes, these gears are perfect for ride-on toy cars.
【Wide Application】Suitable for children's electric cars, motorcycles, and strollers, these gears are compatible with 390/550 motors, making them versatile accessories.
【Multiple Options】Choose from various models and sets, including 550 5P set, 390 gear A set, 390 gear B set, and more. Each set includes different sizes of gears to meet your specific needs.
【Package Includes】Select the desired package option: Listing 1 includes a complete set of gears, while Listing 2 includes a single gear.
description: Product Description: Made of material, Plastic gears for kids electric rc car 550 and 390 gearbox ride toy car Children's electric car large, medium and small gear motorcycle 390/550 motor motor gearbox gear stroller accessories Type: Children's electric car gear Dimensions: as picture shown Model: (optional) 550 5P set 550 5P large gear 550 5P middle gear 550 5P small gear 390 gear A set 390 A large gear 390 A middle gear 390 A small gear 390 gear B set 390 B large gear 390 B middle gear 390 B small gear 550 gear A set 550 A large gear 550 A middle gear 550 A small gear 550 gear B set 550 B large gear, 550 B middle gear 550 B small gear Package includes: (optional) Listing 1: 1 * set of gears Listing 2: 1 * gear
